workflowSteps.name: S012A fixture pack admission
takeoverPoints: replace synthetic localPath with authorized or anonymized school materials before site use
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: remove S012A fixture pack and evidence report

workflowSteps.name: P1 import cut review save source proxy
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-p1-proxy-scenario.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -FileStoreRoot D:\KQG_Data\file_store
takeoverPoints: merge cross-page segments
split over-cut segment
associate shared image
manual box source region
rerun adapter when source is fixed
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: delete generated synthetic source/question rows or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S007C tagging writeback undo
takeoverPoints: teacher modifies AI suggestion before confirm
undo-confirm restores question count
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: undo-confirm removes generated question and mapping; otherwise restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S006B manual takeover workbench
takeoverPoints: merge
split
associate
save_question
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: remove generated review candidates/questions or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S009B blueprint review
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-s009b-blueprint-review-workflow-smoke.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -ApiPort 7001 -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin
takeoverPoints: teacher reviews blueprint before taking questions
delete draft basket if constraints are wrong
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: delete created paper_blueprint_reviews and draft basket rows or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S010B word pdf artifact chain
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-s010b-word-pdf-artifact-chain-smoke.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -ApiPort 7003 -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin
takeoverPoints: export preflight blocks missing formula image source assets
manifest hash verifies generated artifacts
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: delete tmp/s010b-paper-artifacts or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S011A score import
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-s011a-score-import-api-smoke.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -ApiPort 7004 -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin
takeoverPoints: invalid rows remain centralized for teacher correction
no student PII accepted by smoke fixture
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: remove synthetic assessment/score rows or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S011B item score mapping preview
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-s011b-item-score-mapping-ui-api-smoke.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -ApiPort 7005 -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin
takeoverPoints: unclear item-to-question mappings are centralized before report export
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: remove synthetic mapping fixture rows or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: S011C commentary export
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-s011c-commentary-report-export-smoke.ps1 -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseUser postgres -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabasePassword <redacted> -ApiPort 7006 -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin
takeoverPoints: report generation blocks if item score mapping is unclear
AI draft text remains disabled in smoke
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: remove synthetic score/report fixture rows or restore the S012B pre-run backup manifest

workflowSteps.name: O003 backup restore drill
workflowSteps.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/run-o003-recovery-drill-contract.ps1 -BackupRoot tmp/s012b/o003-backup-root -FileStoreRoot D:\KQG_Data\file_store -PgBin C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin -DatabaseName k12_question_graph -DatabaseHost 127.0.0.1 -DatabasePort 5432 -DatabaseUser postgres -ReportPath docs/evidence/20260509-s012b-o003-recovery-drill-report.json
takeoverPoints: restore plan generated with pg_restore -l
schema-only restore extracted in isolated directory
workflowSteps.rollbackAction: delete tmp/s012b/o003-backup-root and tmp/o003 restore-drill directories

failureTakeoverPoints: keep original upload and adapter diagnostics
merge or split affected question segments
skip bad page and rerun adapter after source fix
block commentary export until item score mappings are clear
restore from pre-run backup manifest if rehearsal data must be removed

rollback.code: git revert the S012B commit to remove the orchestration script, gate entry, task status, and evidence files
rollback.data: restore from preRunBackup.manifest if synthetic rehearsal rows or file-store artifacts must be removed

conclusion: S012B ran a non-site proxy E2E rehearsal across import, cut, review, tagging, save, paper, export, score, analysis, and backup/restore evidence. This is still not a live teacher/site validation.
